channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Swift (Weekly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Swift nel periodo weekly.

item.title: 📝 wouterdebie/davit (748 ⭐)

item.title: 📝 gostonx/uninstally (455 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: gostonx

📝 Repository: gostonx/uninstally

📄 Descrizione: A clean, native macOS uninstaller. Completely removes apps and every file they leave behind using smart bundle-identifier detection. SwiftUI + Finder extension.

⭐ Stelle: 455

🍴 Forks: 17

💻 Linguaggio: Swift

📜 Licenza: MIT License

]]>

item.title: 📝 PhraseHQ/SwaTex (63 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: PhraseHQ

📝 Repository: PhraseHQ/SwaTex

📄 Descrizione: 99.9% KaTeX syntax coverage. LaTeX math renderer in pure Swift. No JavaScript, no WebView, no DOM. One Swift core → iOS, macOS, tvOS, watchOS, visionOS. SwiftUI · UIKit/AppKit · SVG · PNG. 2.4× the Rust reference engine. Zero re-rasterization scrolling for block editors. By Phrase (phrase.so).

⭐ Stelle: 63

🍴 Forks: 0

💻 Linguaggio: Swift

🏷️ Topics: ios iosmath katex latex math-rendering swift swiftmath

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-07-09T10:34:03Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-07-15T03:41:43Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>
